description: Curated capability profiles for known model families and specific models. Scores are integers 0-5. Lookup priority: exact model_id match -> family prefix match -> signal inference fallback.

scoring_guide.0: Unsupported - model cannot perform this task
scoring_guide.1: Minimal - handles only the simplest cases
scoring_guide.2: Basic - handles simple queries with limitations
scoring_guide.3: Good - competent for most production tasks
scoring_guide.4: Strong - high quality output, recommended for this task

gemma-4._notes: Google Gemma 4 series — multimodal, vision-capable, strong reasoning

gemma-3._notes: Google Gemma 3 series — vision capable, strong general purpose

gemini-flash._notes: Google Gemini Flash — fast, multimodal, strong tool use

gemini-pro._notes: Google Gemini Pro — strongest Google general purpose model

lyria._notes: Google Lyria — music/audio generation model, not a text LLM

llama-3.1._notes: Meta Llama 3.1 series — strong general purpose, large context

llama-3.2._notes: Meta Llama 3.2 series — small efficient models, limited but fast

llama-3.3._notes: Meta Llama 3.3 70B — strong reasoning, tool calling, near frontier

llama-4._notes: Meta Llama 4 — next generation, vision capable

hermes._notes: NousResearch Hermes — strong instruction following, tool use, function calling

deepseek-r1._notes: DeepSeek R1 — frontier reasoning model, chain-of-thought specialist

deepseek-v3._notes: DeepSeek V3 — strong general purpose, coding, and MoE architecture

deepseek-coder._notes: DeepSeek Coder — specialized code generation model

qwen3._notes: Qwen 3 series — strong reasoning, MoE variants, tool calling

qwen3-coder._notes: Qwen3 Coder — specialized coding model in the Qwen3 family

qwen2.5._notes: Qwen 2.5 series — solid general purpose, decent tool calling

qwen-vl._notes: Qwen VL — vision-language capable Qwen models

nemotron._notes: NVIDIA Nemotron — strong reasoning, specialized models

nemotron-omni._notes: NVIDIA Nemotron Omni — multimodal, audio+image+video input

nemotron-vl._notes: NVIDIA Nemotron VL — vision-language capable Nemotron

mistral._notes: Mistral family — efficient, strong instruction following

dolphin-mistral._notes: Dolphin fine-tuned Mistral — uncensored, general purpose

north-mini-code._notes: Cohere North Mini Code — specialized code generation, with reasoning

laguna._notes: Poolside Laguna — software development specialist model

gpt-oss._notes: OpenAI OSS model — open-source model served via OpenRouter, general purpose

content-safety._notes: NVIDIA Content Safety — moderation classifier, not a chat model
